title: Docker Architecture, OCI Boundaries, Isolation, and Environment Evidence
description: A civic data team must decide whether containers solve its reproducibility problem without claiming virtual-machine isolation or ignoring daemon authority. Learners cumulatively produce container architecture and environment evidence map through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Trace Docker CLI, contexts, Engine API, daemon, containerd, runtime, registry, and host-kernel responsibilities for one operation.
Distinguish a container, image, process, namespace, cgroup, virtual machine, and host kernel without overstating isolation.
Separate OCI image, runtime, and distribution contracts from Docker-specific implementation and product behavior.
